top_signals.title: China May wholesale inflation hits near 4-year high on Iran war, AI costs; consumer inflation misses
top_signals.summary: Price growth has been boosted by a surge in global commodity costs, as the Middle East conflict disrupted energy and raw material flows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Drop as AI Trade Falters, Oil Gains on Iran: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks dropped as technology shares remained under pressure and tensions in the Middle East escalated after US forces struck Iran. Crude oil edged up.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Modular Power Systems Company ERock Raises $600 Million in IPO
top_signals.summary: ERock Inc. raised $600 million in a US initial public offering, pricing its shares at the midpoint of its marketed range.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
